_comment: Manual pitcher-handedness overrides for pitchers whose NCAA roster data is blank or incomplete. Keys are 'Last Name' or 'Full Name' as seen in PBP. Values: 'R', 'L', or 'S' (switch).
_comment_2: parse_pbp.py applies these as a last resort if the roster cache lookup fails. Update this file when you see a pitcher in unresolved list — look up their handedness on the team's official roster page.
